items.title: YouTrackDB is a general-use object-oriented graph database
items.desc: YouTrackDB is a general-use object-oriented graph database with storage format native to handle graph relations. YouTrackDB supports Gremlin queries and ACID transactions. - JetBrains/youtrackdb
